zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Peyvre於1382年出生在英國貝德福爾托丁頓時，她的父親Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre30歲，母親Lady Margaret Loring26歲。她於1402年與John Broughton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年7月26日在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里享年27歲。

zh-hans.Iwerne Stepleton, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特易維爾 斯普萊頓
zh-hans.Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England: 英国貝德福爾哈爾格拉福

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Peyvre于1382年出生在英国貝德福爾托丁頓时，她的父亲Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre30岁，母亲Lady Margaret Loring26岁。她于1402年与John Broughton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年7月26日在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Peyvre was born in 1382, in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre, was 30 and her mother, Lady Margaret Loring, was 26. She married John Broughton in 1402. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 July 1409, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Peyvre est née en 1382, à Toddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Loring, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Broughton en 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1409, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Peyvre 1382 in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Loring 26. Sie hat 1402 John Broughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1409 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Castle Cary, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Peyvre è nata il nel 1382 nel Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Loring, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Broughton nel 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 luglio 1409, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Peyvreが1382年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvreは30歳，母Lady Margaret Loringは26歳であった。1402年にJohn Broughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年7月26日にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Peyvre(이)가 1382년 영국 베드퍼드실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Loring(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1402년 John Broughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 7월 26일 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Castle Cary, Somerset, England: Castle Cary, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Peyvre nasceu em 1382, em Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Loring, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Broughton em 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1409, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Peyvre родилась в 1382 г. в местности тоддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Loring, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Broughton в 1402 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 июля 1409 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Peyvre nació en 1382, en Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Thomas Peyvre 4th Baron Peyvre, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Loring, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Broughton en 1402. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de julio de 1409, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años.
